chatMode.heading: Chat Mode
chatMode.description: Choose how messages are displayed. The character's response itself is unchanged — only the rendering differs.

ROLEPLAY.title: Roleplay Mode
ROLEPLAY.desc: Show action descriptions (《...》) and narration alongside dialogue.

NORMAL.title: Normal Chat Mode
NORMAL.desc: Show only dialogue. Action descriptions and narration are hidden.

spriteMode.heading: Emotion Image Display
spriteMode.description: Choose how character emotion images are shown.

BUBBLE.title: Default
BUBBLE.desc: Pin the latest emotion image as a small fixed thumbnail above the input bar.

FULL.title: Full
FULL.desc: Show as a full-width 9:16 image at the end of each round. Maximum visual impact.

BACKGROUND.title: Background
BACKGROUND.desc: Use the latest emotion image as the chat background, overriding any gallery-set background.

OFF.title: Off
OFF.desc: Hide emotion images entirely. Only text and background remain visible.

about.title: About
about.metaDescription: Pesona is an interactive chat platform where you can talk with emotion-based AI characters in real-time.
about.hero:
Experience immersive conversations
with expressive AI characters
about.feature1Desc: Each character reacts with 10 different emotions (happy, sad, angry, surprised, shy, etc.) — their expressions and sprites change dynamically based on your conversation.
about.feature2Desc: Discover unique AI characters across romance, mystery/RPG, school life, modern fantasy, and more. Each character has their own personality and storyline.
about.feature3Desc: Enjoy natural, immersive conversations through real-time streaming AI chat. Characters stay true to their personality and setting throughout every conversation.
about.feature4Desc: Complete character-specific missions to earn masks. Follow story arcs across ACTs to deepen your relationship with each character.
about.step1: Browse characters on the Home screen
about.step2: Check a character's profile and opening message
about.step3: Tap 'Start Chat' to begin chatting with an AI character

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.effectiveDate: Effective: June 26, 2026 (added provisions on probability-based items)
terms.s1Content: These Terms govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between Pesona (the "Service") and users regarding the use of the AI character chat service provided by Pesona.
s2Items: "Service" refers to the AI character chat platform and related services provided by Pesona.
"User" refers to any person who uses the Service in accordance with these Terms.
"Mask" refers to the virtual currency used within the Service.
"Character" refers to an AI-based conversation partner provided by the Service.
s3Items: These Terms become effective when posted on the Service or otherwise made available to users.
The Service may amend these Terms to the extent permitted by applicable law, and will notify users of any changes along with the effective date and reasons.
s4Items: The Service provides the following features:
The Service may modify its offerings as necessary for operational or technical reasons.
s5Items: Registration is completed via Google OAuth 2.0.
Users must provide accurate information upon registration.
Users under the age of 14 may not use the Service.
s6Items: Masks are used for conversations with AI characters, probability-based item (gacha) draws, and other in-service features.
Additional masks can be earned by completing missions, daily rewards, watching ads, and similar activities.
Masks are non-refundable for cash, and masks once spent are not recoverable.
terms.s7Content: Users must not engage in the following activities:
s7Items: Interfering with the normal operation of the Service
Illegally collecting or using other users' information
Using the Service in violation of applicable laws
Obtaining unfair benefits through abnormal use of the Service
Creating content that infringes on the rights of others
s8Items: Content generated by AI characters within the Service is produced by artificial intelligence and may differ from facts.
Users are responsible for their own judgment and use of AI-generated content.
The Service does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of AI-generated content.
terms.s9Content: The Service may temporarily suspend all or part of the Service in the event of unavoidable circumstances such as system maintenance, equipment failure, or force majeure events.
s10Items: The Service is exempt from liability when it cannot provide the Service due to force majeure or equivalent circumstances.
The Service is not responsible for service disruptions caused by the user's own fault.
terms.s11Content: Matters concerning the processing of users' personal information are governed by the separate <link>Privacy Policy</link>.
terms.s12Content: Any disputes between the Service and users shall be resolved in accordance with applicable laws and submitted to the competent court.
terms.s13Intro: The Service provides probability-based items (hereinafter "gacha") where rewards are determined randomly upon spending masks. In compliance with applicable laws including the Korean Game Industry Promotion Act, the following information is disclosed:
s13Items: Definition: A "probability-based item" refers to a system in which users spend masks to receive a reward determined randomly according to predetermined probabilities.

Disclosure of Odds: For each gacha box, the rarity-tier probabilities, number of reward slots per tier, effective per-item odds, and pity (guarantee) system are disclosed in the "Odds" menu on each box's detail page. Users may review the odds at any time before drawing.

Draw Method: The system first selects a rarity tier according to the disclosed probabilities, then randomly picks one of the user's unowned rewards within that tier. Rewards already owned are automatically excluded from the draw pool, so the effective odds may vary based on the user's collection status.

Dynamic Pool Rewards: Certain rewards such as "Random Expression Image" and "Random Expression + Video Bundle" are drawn uniformly from the pool of expression images of all publicly available characters that the user does not yet own. As new characters and expressions are added, the pool size may change accordingly, which is reflected in real time on the box detail page.

Pity System: Each gacha box has a defined cumulative draw count (e.g., 30 draws) after which the user may directly select one unowned reward from the box. The pity counter is tracked per box and resets to zero upon receiving the guaranteed reward.
Age Restriction: The gacha feature is available only to users aged 19 or older who have completed identity verification, in compliance with the Korean Juvenile Protection Act and related policies.

Payment and Refunds: Masks spent on gacha draws and rewards obtained through draws are non-refundable and non-recoverable. However, in cases of clearly identified system errors causing reward omissions, the operator may provide reasonable compensation.

Right to Modify: The Service may modify gacha box configurations, reward lists, rarity probabilities, pity thresholds, costs, and other elements as required for operational or technical reasons. Material changes adverse to users will be announced at least 7 days in advance via in-service notices.
Advertising Disclosure: When the Service promotes or advertises gacha boxes, such content will clearly indicate that probability-based items are included.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Content: Pesona (the "Service") collects the following personal information to provide its services:
s1Items: Google account information: name, email address, profile picture
Service usage records: chat history, character usage records
Payment information: purchase history (payment details are managed by Google Play)
privacy.s3Content: Your personal information is retained for the duration of your use of the Service and will be promptly destroyed upon account deletion, except where retention is required by applicable law.
s3Items: Consumer protection laws: Records of payment and supply of goods — 5 years
Communication records: Service usage records — 3 months
privacy.s4Content: The Service does not, in principle, provide users' personal information to third parties, except in the following cases:
s4Items: When the user has given prior consent
When required by law or requested by investigative authorities through legally prescribed procedures
privacy.s5Content: The Service entrusts data processing to the following partners to ensure smooth service delivery:
s5Items: OpenAI: AI conversation processing (conversation data transmission)
Google Cloud: Authentication and payment processing
privacy.s6Content: You may exercise the following rights at any time:
s6Items: Request to view your personal information
Request to correct your personal information
Request to delete your personal information by deleting your account
Request to suspend processing of your personal information
privacy.s7Content: When the retention period expires or the purpose of processing is fulfilled, the Service will promptly destroy the relevant personal information. Electronic files are permanently deleted using methods that prevent recovery.
privacy.s9Content: This Privacy Policy may be revised due to changes in laws, policies, or services. Any changes will be announced through the Service.

accountDelete.metaDescription: Guide for deleting your Pesona account.
accountDelete.title: Account Deletion Guide
accountDelete.howToIntro: To delete your Pesona account, please use one of the following methods.
accountDelete.method1Step2: Select My Page from the bottom tab.
accountDelete.method1Step4: Review the notice and proceed with deletion.
accountDelete.method2Body: Send a deletion request to the email below along with the email address registered to your account. Requests are processed within 3 business days.
accountDelete.deletedDataIntro: When your account is deleted, the following data is permanently removed.
accountDelete.deletedItem2: All chat history and character affinity
accountDelete.retentionBody: Personal data is destroyed without delay upon account deletion request. However, where retention is required by applicable law, data is kept for the required period.
accountDelete.retentionItem1: Records related to payments and supply of goods — 5 years
accountDelete.retentionItem2: Records related to service usage — 3 months

refund.metaDescription: Pesona's refund, cancellation, exchange and delivery policy.
refund.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refund.art1Body: This policy governs cancellation, refund and exchange of paid items (LIGHT subscription, mask packages, etc.) for members of the Pesona service operated by PadKet (the "Company"), in accordance with the Korean Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce (the "E-commerce Act") and the Content Industry Promotion Act. The Korean-language version shall prevail in case of any discrepancy.
refund.art2Body: All products sold on Pesona are digital content (virtual currency "masks" and the LIGHT subscription); there is no physical shipment. Content is delivered to the member's account immediately upon payment.
refund.art3Item1: A member may request cancellation within 7 days of payment if any of the following apply.
refund.art3Item1Sub1: No masks have been used since payment.
refund.art3Item1Sub2: For LIGHT subscriptions, no paid content has been used since payment.
refund.art3Item2: Pursuant to Article 17(2) of the E-commerce Act and Article 27 of the Content Industry Promotion Act, cancellation may be restricted in the following cases.
refund.art3Item2Sub1: If a mask has been used at least once (e.g., chat). No refund for the used portion.
refund.art3Item2Sub2: If free masks have been received via LIGHT subscription, or subscription-only content has been accessed.
refund.art3Item2Sub3: If resale has become difficult or the value has materially diminished due to passage of time.
refund.art3Item3: Refunds based on a simple change of mind are also allowed if they meet the requirements of paragraph 1 above.
refund.art4Item1: The LIGHT subscription auto-renews monthly via Google Play. Members can cancel auto-renewal at any time from the Google Play subscriptions menu.
refund.art4Item2: When auto-renewal is cancelled, LIGHT benefits remain until the expiry date of the already-paid term, and the account automatically reverts to FREE tier afterwards.
refund.art4Item3: A full refund is available only within 7 days of payment and only if no subscription benefits have been used.
refund.art4Item4: After 7 days, pro-rata partial refunds cannot be requested; the case is processed as auto-renewal cancellation before the next billing date.
refund.art5Item1: All payments are made through Google Play in-app billing. Refunds may be requested through either of the following channels.
refund.art5Item1Sub1: Google Play customer support refund request (play.google.com/store/account)
refund.art5Item1Sub2: Send a refund request email to the Company's customer center (busGwonyeong@gmail.com)
refund.art5Item2: For requests sent to the Company's customer center, the Company will review eligibility within 3 business days and, if approved, refund to the original payment method within 7 business days.
refund.art5Item3: Google Play's refund policy may take precedence over the Company's policy.
refund.art6Body: All products on Pesona are digital content with no physical delivery process. Content is automatically delivered to the member's account immediately upon payment. Accordingly, shipping fees, delivery delays, or lost shipments do not apply.
refund.art7Body: Due to the nature of digital content, exchanges between identical items do not apply. However, if paid content is not properly delivered or is defective due to the Company's fault, the following applies.
refund.art7Item1: Re-delivery of proper content, or a full refund of the payment amount.
refund.art7Item2: For refunds due to the Company's fault, the full amount is refunded regardless of the time of payment.
refund.art8Item1: Send refund requests to busGwonyeong@gmail.com with the following information.
refund.art8Item2: We will respond with the processing result within 3 business days of receiving the request.
refund.art9Body: In the event of a dispute related to this policy, the Consumer Dispute Resolution Standards under the Framework Act on Consumers (notified by the Korea Fair Trade Commission) may apply, with priority given to amicable consultation between the Company and the member.
refund.bizInfo3: Address: 19-10, World Cup buk-ro 6-gil, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Korea
